title: Floral Wrap Midi Dress
image_alt: Floral wrap midi dress in soft pastels
short_description: A flowing wrap dress with delicate floral print on lightweight chiffon fabric.
styling_tip: Pair with strappy sandals and a straw tote for a garden party look.
color_tips: Best in blush pink, sage green, and cream combinations.

title: Oversized Linen Blazer
image_alt: Oversized linen blazer in natural beige
short_description: A relaxed-fit blazer crafted from breathable European linen.
styling_tip: Layer over a slip dress or wear with high-waisted wide-leg pants.
color_tips: Natural beige pairs beautifully with ivory and terracotta.

title: Slim Fit Wool Blazer
image_alt: Slim fit wool blazer in charcoal
short_description: A tailored wool blazer with a modern slim silhouette.
styling_tip: Perfect over a crisp white shirt with dark denim for smart-casual events.
color_tips: Charcoal works with navy, burgundy, and forest green.

title: Cotton Oxford Shirt
image_alt: Classic cotton oxford shirt in light blue
short_description: A versatile oxford shirt made from premium Portuguese cotton.
styling_tip: Roll the sleeves and leave untucked over chinos for weekend style.
color_tips: Light blue complements khaki, navy, and grey trousers.

title: High-Rise Wide Leg Trousers
image_alt: High-rise wide leg trousers in camel
short_description: Elegant wide-leg trousers with a flattering high waist and pressed front.
styling_tip: Tuck in a fitted turtleneck and add heeled boots for a sophisticated silhouette.
color_tips: Camel and cognac tones create a refined monochrome look.

title: Slim Cargo Joggers
image_alt: Slim cargo joggers in olive green
short_description: Modern cargo joggers with a slim taper and functional pocket detail.
styling_tip: Style with a basic tee and clean white sneakers for effortless cool.
color_tips: Olive green pairs well with black, cream, and rust orange.

title: Slip Midi Dress
image_alt: Satin slip midi dress in champagne
short_description: A figure-skimming slip dress in lustrous satin with delicate straps.
styling_tip: Layer under the oversized blazer or wear alone with minimalist gold jewelry.
color_tips: Champagne and ivory tones suit warm and cool skin undertones alike.
occasion: date night, cocktail party, summer wedding

title: Tiered Maxi Dress
image_alt: Tiered maxi dress in floral print
short_description: A breezy tiered maxi dress with an all-over botanical print.
styling_tip: Add a wide-brimmed hat and espadrilles for a complete bohemian vibe.
color_tips: Choose warm terracotta or cool indigo prints based on your coloring.

title: Pleated Mini Skirt
image_alt: Pleated mini skirt in cherry red
short_description: A crisp pleated mini skirt with a comfortable elastic waistband.
styling_tip: Pair with an oversized sweater and knee-high boots for transitional dressing.
color_tips: Red pops against black and navy; try mint for unexpected contrast.

title: Midi A-Line Skirt
image_alt: Midi A-line skirt in burgundy leather
short_description: A sophisticated A-line midi skirt crafted from supple faux leather.
styling_tip: Balance the texture with a soft cashmere knit and pointed-toe flats.
color_tips: Burgundy adds richness to black, cream, and camel wardrobe staples.

title: Chunky Platform Sneakers
image_alt: White chunky platform sneakers
short_description: Bold platform sneakers with retro-inspired proportions and cushioned soles.
styling_tip: Style with mini skirts, baggy jeans, or flowy dresses for balanced proportions.
color_tips: White is versatile; experiment with color-blocked versions.

title: Retro Running Sneakers
image_alt: Retro running sneakers in navy and white
short_description: Authentic retro-inspired running shoes with suede overlays and vintage colorways.
styling_tip: Wear with joggers, shorts, or tapered denim for a sporty casual look.
color_tips: Navy and white works with nearly every casual color palette.

title: Leather Low-Top Sneakers
image_alt: White leather low-top sneakers
short_description: Clean-cut leather sneakers with minimal branding and premium construction.
styling_tip: The white-on-white look works best with dark indigo jeans and grey trousers.
color_tips: White leather shows less scuffing than canvas in daily wear.

title: Woven Leather Sandals
image_alt: Woven leather sandals in tan
short_description: Hand-woven leather sandals with cushioned footbed and adjustable straps.
styling_tip: Perfect with linen trousers, flowy dresses, or cropped denim.
color_tips: Tan and cognac complement sun-kissed skin beautifully.

title: Canvas Slip-On Loafers
image_alt: Navy canvas slip-on loafers
short_description: Lightweight canvas loafers with a flexible sole and easy on-off design.
styling_tip: Pair with chinos and a polo shirt for smart-casual weekend style.
color_tips: Navy canvas reads more refined than black in spring contexts.

title: Structured Leather Tote
image_alt: Structured leather tote in black
short_description: A refined structured tote with interior organization and reinforced handles.
styling_tip: Use as a work bag Monday through Friday; add a silk scarf for weekend flair.
color_tips: Black is timeless; cognac develops beautiful patina over time.

title: Crossbody Camera Bag
image_alt: Crossbody camera bag in olive green
short_description: A compact camera bag silhouette with adjustable strap and multiple pockets.
styling_tip: Wear crossbody for hands-free exploring or shorten to a shoulder bag.
color_tips: Olive green adds casual warmth to both denim and neutral palettes.

title: Minimalist Backpack
image_alt: Sleek minimalist backpack in charcoal
short_description: A sleek backpack with padded laptop compartment and clean exterior.
styling_tip: Works equally well for commute, campus, or short overnight trips.
color_tips: Charcoal hides wear better than black and pairs with any color.

title: Oversized Cat-Eye Sunglasses
image_alt: Oversized cat-eye sunglasses with black frames
short_description: Statement cat-eye sunglasses with UV-protective lenses and dramatic shape.
styling_tip: Balance the drama with minimal jewelry and bold lip color.
color_tips: Classic black suits most face shapes; try tortoise for warmth.

title: Round Wire-Frame Sunglasses
image_alt: Gold wire-frame round sunglasses
short_description: Wire-frame round sunglasses inspired by vintage intellectual style.

color_tips: Gold frames pop against warm skin tones; silver suits cooler coloring.

title: Layered Chain Necklace Set
image_alt: Gold layered chain necklace set
short_description: A curated set of three chains in varying lengths for effortless layering.
styling_tip: Mix metals or stick to one tone for a cohesive, intentional look.
color_tips: 14k gold flatters warm undertones; silver and white gold suit cool tones.

title: Stackable Hoop Earrings
image_alt: Small gold stackable hoop earrings
short_description: Delicate hoop earrings designed to be worn alone or stacked.
styling_tip: Start with one pair and add more for a curated ear effect.
color_tips: Yellow gold is timeless; rose gold adds warmth to all skin tones.

title: Beaded Stretch Bracelet
image_alt: Natural stone beaded bracelet set
short_description: A set of three stretch bracelets featuring natural stones and matte finishes.
styling_tip: Stack with a watch or wear alone for a relaxed, grounded aesthetic.
color_tips: Earth tones complement tan lines and summer wardrobes.

title: Wide Leather Waist Belt
image_alt: Wide leather waist belt in cognac
short_description: A statement waist belt in full-grain leather with brushed metal buckle.
styling_tip: Cinch an oversized sweater dress or layer over an oversized blazer.
color_tips: Cognac pairs with black, white, and camel wardrobe essentials.

title: Classic Reversible Belt
image_alt: Classic reversible belt in black and brown
short_description: A versatile reversible belt with one side black and one side brown.
styling_tip: Match to your shoe color for a polished, cohesive outfit.
color_tips: Reversible design eliminates the need for two separate belts.

title: Wide-Brim Straw Hat
image_alt: Wide-brim straw hat with navy ribbon
short_description: A classic wide-brim straw hat with grosgrain ribbon detail.
styling_tip: Add SPF and style with maxi dresses, swim cover-ups, or linen sets.

title: Dad Cap
image_alt: Cotton dad cap in washed black
short_description: A relaxed five-panel dad cap with curved brim and adjustable strap.

color_tips: Washed black has lived-in character that matches most casual palettes.

title: Wool Fedora
image_alt: Wool fedora in charcoal grey
short_description: A structured wool fedora with grosgrain band and leather trim.

title: Graphic Print Hoodie
image_alt: Oversized graphic hoodie in heather grey
short_description: An oversized fleece hoodie with original graphic artwork.

title: Cargo Pants with Pocket Detail
image_alt: Olive cargo pants with multiple pockets
short_description: Relaxed-fit cargo pants with utilitarian pocket detailing.

title: Cropped Puffer Jacket
image_alt: Cropped quilted puffer jacket in silver
short_description: A cropped quilted puffer with stand collar and zip closure.

title: Baggy Fit Cargo Shorts

title: Faux Fur Trim Coat

short_description: A cocoon-shaped wool coat with luxurious faux fur collar.

title: Quilted Lined Jacket
image_alt: Olive quilted lined jacket
short_description: A lightweight quilted jacket with quilted lining for transitional weather.

title: Cashmere V-Neck Sweater
image_alt: Cashmere v-neck sweater in oatmeal
short_description: Pure cashmere sweater with relaxed v-neck and ribbed trim.

title: Merino Wool Crewneck
image_alt: Merino wool crewneck sweater in burgundy
short_description: A refined crewneck made from extra-fine merino wool.

title: Silk Square Scarf
image_alt: Printed silk square scarf in floral

title: Lightweight Rain Jacket
image_alt: Packable rain jacket in yellow

title: Ribbed Tank Top

title: Linen Wide-Leg Pants
image_alt: Linen wide-leg pants in natural

title: Cropped Denim Jacket

short_description: A classic cropped denim jacket with button front and chest pockets.

title: Relaxed Fit Chinos

short_description: Comfortable relaxed-fit chinos with soft hand feel.

title: Pique Polo Shirt

title: Heavyweight Cotton Tee

title: Tapered Ankle Pants

title: Straight Leg Selvedge Denim

title: Shirt Dress with Belt

title: Off-Shoulder Knit Dress

title: Asymmetric Hem Skirt

title: Wrap Tennis Skirt

title: Pearl Drop Earrings
image_alt: Freshwater pearl drop earrings in gold

title: Rope Belt

title: Bucket Hat

title: Oversized Graphic Tee

short_description: A boxy oversized tee with retro-inspired screen print.

title: Trench Coat
image_alt: Classic trench coat in camel

title: Bandeau Top

title: Linen Summer Suit
